problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Federated. Federated learning without data centralization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
